mapper.select: select id, pair_id, operate_account, operate_user_name, operate_type, content, score, file_urls, operate_time from tb_pair_time_line where id = #{id}

SELECT id, pair_id AS pairId, operate_account AS operateAccount, operate_user_name AS operateUserName, operate_type AS operateType, content, score, file_urls AS fileUrls, operate_time AS operateTime FROM tb_pair_time_line WHERE pair_id = #{pairId} ORDER BY operate_time DESC
mapper.insert: insert into tb_pair_time_line(pair_id, operate_account, operate_user_name, operate_type, content, score, file_urls, operate_time) values (#{pairId}, #{operateAccount}, #{operateUserName}, #{operateType}, #{content}, #{score}, #{fileUrls}, #{operateTime})

insert into tb_pair_time_line(pair_id, operate_account, operate_user_name, operate_type, content, score, file_urls, operate_time) values
(#{entity.pairId}, #{entity.operateAccount}, #{entity.operateUserName}, #{entity.operateType}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.fileUrls}, #{entity.operateTime})

insert into tb_pair_time_line(pair_id, operate_account, operate_user_name, operate_type, content, score, file_urls, operate_time) values
(#{entity.pairId}, #{entity.operateAccount}, #{entity.operateUserName}, #{entity.operateType}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.fileUrls}, #{entity.operateTime})
on duplicate key update pair_id = values(pair_id), operate_account = values(operate_account), operate_user_name = values(operate_user_name), operate_type = values(operate_type), content = values(content), score = values(score), file_urls = values(file_urls), operate_time = values(operate_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_pair_time_line
pair_id = #{pairId},
operate_account = #{operateAccount},
operate_user_name = #{operateUserName},
operate_type = #{operateType},
content = #{content},
score = #{score},
file_urls = #{fileUrls},
operate_time = #{operateTime},
where id = #{id}
